package rulecoverage

func NegativeGormModelHookContainsExternalIo() string {
    ruleID := "gorm_model_hook_contains_external_io"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Hooks that call HTTP clients, queues, file I/O, or external side effects."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
